candidates.why: Separate same-level operating D&A line, but not labelled as cost of sales / materials / production-related D&A. With selected COGS bucket limited to 'Materials and services', there is no clear evidence this total D&A should be assigned specifically to COGS.
Looks like a component of total D&A and not specifically tied to COGS; also appears below financial lines, so less suitable for operating COGS D&A mapping.
Looks like a component of total D&A and not specifically tied to COGS; no indication it belongs to the selected 'Materials and services' bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific D&A row is shown. The separate 'Depreciation and Amortization' line is not clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket, so conservatively do not add a COGS_DA row to avoid misallocation or double counting.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line at the same level as the selected overhead rows ('Employee benefit expenses', 'Other Operating Expenses'). Since XSGA components were selected excluding D&A, this row appears to sit outside that bucket and should be added separately. It is also the summary row, preferable to components.
Likely a component of the total 'Depreciation and Amortization' row, so should not be chosen when the summary row exists.
Likely a component of the total 'Depreciation and Amortization' row, so should not be chosen when the summary row exists.

variables.notes: OK. Use the summary operating D&A row only. It appears separate from the selected XSGA component rows and should be added later to avoid omitting overhead D&A. Do not also include component rows.
